nodes.label: AI as wise sounding board for creative ideation
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous creator that thinks for me
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to be a wise sounding board

nodes.label: AI as support for writing mechanics and confidence
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that undermines authentic skill
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as a support because I'm not fully confident in my writing

nodes.label: AI as impartial mediator in team creative gridlock
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of fully adopted output that overrides team
nodes.grounding_span: we turned to AI...we didn't fully adopt its output, it got us moving

nodes.label: Mastering AI as a strategic leadership skill
nodes.label_negative: Relying on AI as a branding faux pas
nodes.grounding_span: Being the EP who knows how to effectively implement AI is a different story

nodes.label: AI as additive partner in human-centered management
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human judgment in management
nodes.grounding_span: I see it as additive, not a replacement...partner in dealing with very human, employee focused realms

nodes.label: Authentic creative ownership and self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: I like to take ownership of them

nodes.label: Confidence and lowered psychological barriers in writing
nodes.grounding_span: it has boosted my confidence a little, and lowered the psychological barriers

nodes.label: Team collaboration and project completion
nodes.grounding_span: we were able to customize the idea to our project and get it finished

nodes.label: Professional reputation and strategic positioning
nodes.grounding_span: being known as the EP relying on AI would be a branding faux pas

nodes.label: Human-centric management and team development
nodes.grounding_span: identifying strengths, teambuilding, task delegation and scheduling

nodes.label: Affection for AI as confidence booster and creative enabler
nodes.grounding_span: it has made me kind of fall back in love with writing

nodes.label: Resistance to AI overshadowing authentic voice
nodes.grounding_span: I dont want it to think FOR me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as impartial gridlock breaker
nodes.grounding_span: it got us moving and we were able to customize the idea

nodes.label: Strategic concealment of AI reliance from clients
nodes.grounding_span: I certainly dont want to communicate...that everything Im doing is heavily reliant on support form AI

nodes.label: Optimistic openness to expanding AI use in management
nodes.grounding_span: I fully expect to integrate into my processes...Really understanding how to incorporate it is a goal

nodes.label: Bouncing ideas back and forth — iterative co-creation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to bounce bounce ideas back and forth

nodes.label: Protective possessiveness over core ideas — boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: I do tend to feel possessive of the core idea or premise of any project
